name: Applique Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out each dough until 1/8 inch thick.
2. Cut cookie shapes of different sizes from each dough using cookie cutters or cardboard forms.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F and line baking sheets with parchment paper.
4. With a pastry brush, coat the underside of the smaller cookies with egg-white "glue."
5. Place the smaller cookies on top of contrasting-color larger cookies.
6. Set the cookies about 1 to 2 inches apart on the baking sheets.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Cool the cookies on racks.
